prestazioni: APR Stage 2+ ECU/TCU flash for the **EA888 Gen3B (CZPB 2.0 TFSI)** with upgraded **Garrett GT2867RS turbocharger**, supporting 380 HP and 480 Nm on 98 RON fuel, paired with a **034 Motorsport high-pressure fuel pump (HPFP)** and **Morrison Motorsports 3" downpipe** with 200-cell catalytic converter for Euro 6 compliance

KW Suspensions **Clubsport coilovers** with **B10-specific valving** and **adjustable top mounts**, featuring 24-way rebound damping and 12-way compression adjustment, paired with **034 Motorsport subframe reinforcement kit** and **H&R 25mm front / 22mm rear sway bars** for B9 platform rigidity

Brembo **GT 6-piston front (380mm) and 4-piston rear (356mm) big brake kit** with **two-piece floating rotors** and **Ferodo DS2500 pads**, paired with **Goodridge 6AN stainless steel brake lines** and **Motul RBF 660 racing brake fluid** for fade resistance under track use
estetica: Rocket Bunny **Pandem V2 widebody kit** for B9 A4, featuring **carbon fiber front fenders, rear quarter panels, and rear diffuser**, with **custom 3M Matte Military Green wrap** and **debadged grille** for stealth aesthetics

OEM+ **Audi Sport S4-style front bumper** with **integrated carbon fiber splitter** and **custom LED fog light delete plates**, paired with **VMR V710 19x9.5 ET35 wheels** in **Gunmetal finish** with **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (265/30/19)**

Interior overhaul with **Recaro Pole Position seats (carbon shell, FIA-approved)** wrapped in **Nappa leather with Alcantara inserts**, **MOMO Prototipo steering wheel (380mm, suede)**, and **custom aluminum shift knob** with **034 Motorsport weighted shift adapter** for the **DL501 7-speed S tronic transmission**
